title: Settings
about_subtitle: Contact the developer for support or feedback
clear_data_confirm: Are you sure? This will delete all your data.
delete_transactions_confirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all your transactions.
about_description: TAI Expense helps you track your daily spending, set budgets, and take control of your finances. Built for migrant workers and daily earners.
mission_description: We believe everyone deserves simple, powerful tools to manage their money — no matter where they are or what language they speak.
support_description: If you enjoy using TAI Expense and want to support the project, or if you have feedback, feel free to reach out!
